zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Kynaston於1462年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾霍德利時，她的父親Sir Roger Kynaston29歲，母親Elizabeth Grey23歲。她和Richard Hanmer至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1497年在威爾士福林爾韓麥享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Kynaston于1462年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾霍德利时，她的父亲Sir Roger Kynaston29岁，母亲Elizabeth Grey23岁。她和Richard Hanmer至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1497年在威尔士福林爾韓麥享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Kynaston was born in 1462, in Hordley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Roger Kynaston, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Grey, was 23. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Richard Hanmer. She died in 1497, in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, at the age of 35.

fr.Plâs Yr Owredd, Hanmer, Flintshire, Wale: Hanmer, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Kynaston est née en 1462, à Hordley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Kynaston, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Grey, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Richard Hanmer. Elle est décédée en 1497, à Hanmer, Flintshire, Galles, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Kynaston 1462 in Hordley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger Kynaston 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Grey 23. Sie hatte mit Richard Hanmer mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1497 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales.

ht.Plâs Yr Owredd, Hanmer, Flintshire, Wale: Hanmer, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Kynaston è nata il nel 1462 nel Hordley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Roger Kynaston, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Grey, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Richard Hanmer. Morì nel 1497, nel Hanmer, Flintshire, Galles, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Kynastonが1462年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアホールドリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Kynastonは29歳，母Elizabeth Greyは23歳であった。彼女はRichard Hanmerとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1497年にウェールズフリントシュアイアハンマーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Kynaston(이)가 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 호르들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Kynaston(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Grey(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Richard Hanmer(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 웨일스 플린츠히르 핸머에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Kynaston родилась в 1462 г. в местности хаурдли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Kynaston было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Grey, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Richard Hanmer. Она умерла в 1497 г. в местности ханмир, флинцхир, Уэльс в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Kynaston nació en 1462, en Hordley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Roger Kynaston, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Grey, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Richard Hanmer. Murió en 1497, en Hanmer, Flintshire, Gales, a la edad de 35 años.
